description: Phase parent for authoring manual_testing_playbook packages for sk-code-review and sk-git. Both children complete: 18 sk-code-review scenarios + 22 sk-git scenarios, all validated and DQI-clean.
lastOutcome: Both child phases complete. sk-code-review playbook (18 scenarios across 6 categories) and sk-git playbook (22 scenarios across 6 categories) authored by cli-codex (gpt-5.5 high, normal mode); 6 P1 findings from @review DQI passes resolved; all sk-doc and structural gates clean.
